mapper.select:
SELECT id, ecm_component_name, ecm_spec_model, ecm_manufacturer, ecm_factory_no, ecm_install_location, ecm_commissioning_date, ecm_rated_parameters, ecm_factory, ecm_reserve_1, ecm_reserve_2, ecm_reserve_3 FROM electric_cabinet_main_component
AND ecm_component_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.ecmComponentName}, '%')
AND ecm_manufacturer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.ecmManufacturer}, '%')
AND ecm_factory_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryParams.ecmFactoryNo}, '%')
